title: OCI FinOps - AI Team Spend
description: Internal AI team cost breakdown by compartment and service

list.name: compartment
list.label: Compartment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT compartment_name FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' ORDER BY compartment_name

list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT servicename FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' ORDER BY servicename

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "MTD Spend" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service))

SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Previous Month" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND cost_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service))

WITH cur AS ( SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS spend FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) ), prev AS ( SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS spend FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND cost_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) ) SELECT CASE WHEN prev.spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((cur.spend - prev.spend) / prev.spend) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS "MoM Change %" FROM cur, prev

SELECT cost_date AS time, SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) GROUP BY cost_date ORDER BY cost_date

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', cost_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Month", SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '12 months' AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) GROUP BY date_trunc('month', cost_date) ORDER BY date_trunc('month', cost_date)

SELECT display_name AS "Compartment", SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY display_name ORDER BY SUM(total_billed_cost) DESC

SELECT cost_date AS time, display_name AS metric, SUM(total_billed_cost) AS value FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) GROUP BY cost_date, display_name ORDER BY cost_date

SELECT servicename AS "Service", SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) GROUP BY servicename ORDER BY SUM(total_billed_cost) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT display_name AS "Compartment", servicename AS "Service", SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost", SUM(total_effective_cost) AS "Effective Cost", SUM(line_item_count) AS "Line Items" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team = 'AI' AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) GROUP BY display_name, servicename ORDER BY SUM(total_billed_cost) DESC
